name: Omon.hfxint
title: Vertically Integrated Ocean Heat X Transport
description: Ocean heat x transport vertically integrated over the whole ocean depth. Contains all contributions to 'x-ward' heat transport from resolved and parameterized processes. Use Celsius for temperature scale. Report on native horizontal grid.
processing note: 2d field for CMIP6. Report on native horizontal grid. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6: compound name, 'int' Disambiguation added to allow for both Omon.hfx (3d) and Omon.hfxint (2d). 2d vertically integrated field. If the full 3d transport is preferred, produce Omon.hfx instead.
